overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a video game (resembling Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character walking along a rocky mountain trail. The camera follows a winding dirt path through a sunlit mountain valley before a rider on a white horse enters from the left, prompting the camera to follow the horse rider as they ascend the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain hiking trail between steep slopes

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt trail winding through the rocky mountainside, surrounded by cliffs and sparse vegetation

entered.detail: steep gray rock wall forming the left boundary of the trail with rough texture
scattered boulders and loose rocks covering the hillside to the right
narrow winding path composed of dirt and embedded stones
tall pine trees growing on the upper ridges against the sky

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a solitary walk along a narrow mountain trail enclosed by rocky cliffs on the left and sloping terrain on the right. The path winds upward through moderate vegetation under direct midday sunlight, with pine trees visible on the distant ridges. No other characters or animals are present as the camera moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail with horse rider ascending

events.description: rider on white horse enters from left and moves ahead, camera transitions to following the horse up the trail

agents.ego_description: following the horse rider at a walking pace, maintaining distance as the horse trots up the mountain path

notable_agents.action: riding a white horse up the mountain trail, moving away from the camera

entered.detail: dark opening in the rock face visible on the left side of the trail

segments.scene_description: A rider on a white horse enters from the left and the camera follows them ascending the mountain trail. A dark cave entrance becomes visible in the left cliff face as the path continues winding upward. The rocky terrain remains consistent but shifts in perspective as the camera follows the moving horse, with the surrounding cliffs and distant pines appearing closer as the elevation increases.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady camera movement along a solitary mountain trail that winds upward through a rugged, sunlit valley. It begins by tracing a narrow dirt path enclosed by towering rocky cliffs on the left and sloping terrain on the right. As the camera moves forward, the path curves through patches of moderate vegetation under the glare of direct midday sunlight. The scene then expands to reveal distant ridges dotted with pine trees before continuing its steady ascent through the quiet wilderness.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that tracks a rider ascending a rugged mountain trail toward higher elevations. It begins as a rider on a white horse enters from the left, prompting the camera to follow them as they wind upward along the rocky path. As the horse climbs, the perspective shifts to bring the surrounding cliffs and distant pine trees into closer view. The scene then reveals a dark cave entrance embedded in the left cliff face before continuing its ascent through the consistent, stony terrain.
